fajita-chicken-puff-pastry-twists.name: Fajita Chicken Puff Pastry Twists
instructions: Dust a clean work surface with a sprinkling of flour, and roll half of the puff pastry into a large circle.
Place the largest plate you have (a pizza tray also works) on top of the pastry and tear around the edges to create a clean circle. Repeat with the other half of the pastry.
Preheat the oven to 200°C (204°C) (Gas Mark 6).
Fry the onions and mixed peppers until the onions are translucent.

Add the pre-cooked shredded chicken (to make shredded chicken, simply season and bake some chicken breasts, put it into a bowl and tear it up with 2 forks). Stir in the fajita spice mix and allow to cool while you do the next step.
Transfer one of the sheets to a baking tray, and spread the chicken fajita mix in an even layer, leaving about 1 cm (½ inch) free from the edge. Sprinkle a layer of cheese.
Cover with the second layer of puff pastry. Place an egg cup (or a shot glass) in the center of the pastry and make 8-10 even cuts all the way around the pastry.
Brush the beaten egg over the puff pastry.
Twist each segment twice to make it resemble a sun-like shape.
Bake for 18-22 minutes in the center of the oven, until deep golden brown and no grey patches remain on the pastry.
Enjoy!

fancy-cocktail-row-the-boat.name: Fancy Cocktail: Row The Boat
instructions: For sugar rim: Dip martini glass in lemon juice and directly dip into sugar.
In a cocktail shaker filled with ice, combine the vanilla vodka, coconut rum, cream of coconut, and pineapple juice. Shake for 20 seconds, then strain.
Garnish.
Enjoy!

fast-food-argiro.name: Fast Food

ingredients.item: 100 grit butter or coconut butter melted and cold
100 grit butter or coconut butter melted and cold

instructions: In a pot, add the milk or water, with the sugar warm.
Add the salt, vanillas and semolina raincoat and mix with wire until it boils and binds.
Once it thinks, remove it from the heat and add the veteran butter.
Mix to melt the butter well.
Let it cool and tighten slightly.

fasting-carrot-cake-argiro.name: Fasting Carrot Cake
instructions: Shake the flower with a Sieve in a bowl and set aside.
Choose fresh cars, garnish them and rub them in a thin scrub and set aside.
Preheat the evening to 170oC degrees in residence, we will make on the bottom hour grill.
They oil and flour a baking pan or round form with a detachable base of ECU 26 million.
For easy dissipation, you better put anti-stick paper on the basis of the form.

fennel-and-coriander-spiced-salmon-fille.name: Fennel- And Coriander-spiced Salmon Fillets
instructions: Prepare barbecue for high heat.
Coarsely grind fennel seeds and coriander seeds in a spice grinder.
Brush salmon fillets generously with extra-virgin olive oil.
Sprinkle both sides of the fillets with salt and pepper, then with the ground spice mixture, pressing gently to ensure adherence.
Grill salmon, covered, until the center is just opaque, about 4 minutes per side.

feta-and-slow-roasted-tomato-salad-with-.name: Feta And Slow-roasted Tomato Salad With French Green Beans

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat an oven to 107°C (110 degrees C).
Slice the cherry tomatoes in half, and arrange them, cut sides up, on a baking sheet. Sprinkle them with salt, pepper, and the bay leaf; drizzle with 1/4 cup olive oil.
Bake the tomatoes until they are shriveled and dry on the outside, but a little moist inside, about 2 hours.
Toast the pine nuts in a small pan over medium-low heat, gently shaking the pan as they toast, until beginning brown and fragrant, 2 to 3 minutes; set aside.
Bring a saucepan of water to a boil; cook the green beans in the boiling water until bright green but still crisp, about 3 minutes. Drain and rinse immediately with cold water.

Combine the roasted tomatoes, toasted pine nuts, green beans, arugula, and basil in a salad bowl. Whisk together the red wine vinegar, mustard, garlic, honey, and 1/4 cup olive oil in a bowl, and pour the dressing over the salad. Stir in the crumbled feta cheese just before serving.

fig-ricotta-cake.name: Fig-ricotta Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Spray a 9x5-inch loaf pan with nonstick spray.
Whisk 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and salt together in a medium bowl.

Beat ricotta cheese, sugar, and butter in a bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed until smooth, about 2 minutes. Beat in eggs, one at a time, followed by almond extract. Beat in flour mixture on low speed, scraping down the sides of the bowl until combined; beat batter for about 30 seconds more.
Place chopped figs into a bowl, sprinkle with 1 tablespoon flour, and stir to coat. Fold figs into batter, then pour into the prepared loaf pan. Place fig slices on top of batter, down the center.
Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean, 45 to 60 minutes. Remove from the oven and place on a wire rack to cool, 20 to 30 minutes.
Remove cooled cake from the pan and dust with confectioners' sugar.

firik-bulgur-risotto-recipe-lezzet.name: Firik Bulgur Risotto Recipe

Semi-half firik and fine rice bulgur (for more soft treats)
Arpa city (it gives a close structure to therisotto texture)
Toothed wheat (more economical and soft end)

Hot milk (for wetsi swelling, careful use)
Fresh thyme or chalk (a functional review)
Dried mushroom (it creates a depth of aroma by eating and eating)
Rifle flavored olive oil (very small amount)

2. Add onion and roast until soften.

fish-kidney-with-semolina-argiro.name: Fish Kidney With Semolina
instructions: Cut the fishnet into stripes and add to the bowl.
Add 1 tablespoon olive oil, lemon juice, garlic.
Cover the bowl and leave it in the refrigerator for 1 hour, marinate.
Soak the oatmeal in a bowl with cold water for 15 minutes.
Then drag it well, remove all liquids.
In a large saucepan, heat 1 tablespoon olive oil.
Add the marinated meat and simmer for about 8 minutes until it is well cooked.
We put it on a platter and keep it warm.
Add the remaining oil (1 tablespoon), mushrooms and fresh versions to the same pan and leave them for 2'-3' to Wilt.
Add the tomatoes and oatmeal and leave them for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the herbs, put the beat back in the pan.
Add salt and pepper and serve.

fish-packets-with-snap-peas-tomatoes-and.name: Fish Packets With Snap Peas, Tomatoes, And Herb Butter
instructions: Preheat oven to 204°C. Mix butter, herbs, 1 tsp. salt, and 1/2 tsp. pepper in a small bowl.

Fold parchment sheets in half and use scissors to cut halves into 4 large hearts. Unfold and place parchment hearts open on a work surface. Spoon 1 Tbsp. herb butter in the center of one half of each heart, then divide snap peas, tomatoes, and garlic evenly into small piles over butter. Lay fish over vegetables, then top with 1 Tbsp. herb butter; season each with 1/8 tsp. salt and a pinch of pepper. Fold parchment over and crimp edges tightly to form a sealed packet.

Transfer packets to 2 large rimmed baking sheets, arranging in a single layer. Bake until just cooked through and a tester inserted through parchment slides through fish easily, about 13 minutes. Carefully cut open packets (steam will escape). Top with basil.
Butter can be made 3 days ahead; cover and chill. Fish packets can be assembled 4 hours ahead; chill. Let sit at room temperature 15 minutes before cooking.

fish-salad-recipe-lezzet.name: Fish Salad Recipe

ingredients.item: Instead of Roka you can use fresh spinach, curly marul or fresh mint.
Instead of Maydanoz, you can change the aroma by adding dereotu, fesle or fresh onion.
Instead of tomato, you can use cherry tomatoes, yellow or orange beating pepper.
You can get different textures by adding.

You can add a sweet-groom aroma by adding hardal or honey.
Instead of salt and pepper, you can get different flavors with pepper, thyme or phenol.
You can add to light vegetables or capari.
You can add boiled corn, black or green olive to salad.
Lightweight &ccedil to salad with chopped walnut or almond; you can add texture.
You can increase protein rate by adding cube fresh cheese (white cheese or lor cheese).
You can prepare a stylish presentation by serving the salad in small serving bowls.

instructions: 1. Tomato, cucumber, red and green peppers cube shaped, chop onion as thin ring.
2. Wash and chop the chakra or yeast.

4. U add olive oil, lemon juice, salt and pepper and mix it with gentlece.
5. Offer the salad alongside the fish serving plate.
6. Depending on the request, you can sprinkle the pepper or rub the pepper.

five-layer-ice-cream-bars.name: Five Layer Ice Cream Bars
instructions: Combine evaporated milk, 1/2 cup butter, chocolate chips, and confectioners' sugar in a saucepan over medium heat. Bring to a boil, and cook 8 minutes, stirring constantly. Remove from heat, and stir in vanilla extract. Allow to cool thoroughly.
Mix crushed chocolate sandwich cookies and 1/2 cup melted butter in a large bowl until combined. Press onto the bottom of a 9x13 inch pan; freeze until firm.
Spread softened ice cream over crust, then freeze until firm.
Spread top with cooled fudge sauce, and sprinkle with peanuts; freeze until firm. Spread with whipped topping, and freeze until firm, or overnight.

flannel-factor.name: Flannel Factor
instructions: In a mixing glass or shaking tin, combine the dark rum, rye, cold brew coffee concentrate, and amaretto. Add ice and stir gently for 20 seconds. Pour into an old fashioned glass filled with ice and garnish with the Luxardo cherries on a pick.

flounder-with-orange-sauce-lezzet.name: Flounder With Orange Sauce
instructions: 1. Take the fish into the oven tray that you lubricate lightly.
2. On the salt, sprinkle the pepper and visit the olive oil.
3. Cook for 10 minutes in the oven of 160 degrees.
4. Lighten the sauce pan with orange juice on the other side.
5. Add and mix the butter.
6. Finally, add the oranges you’ve filled with the cube and the tarh you’re fine and close the stove.
7. Take the fish to the service plate.
8. Visit and serve the sauce on it.
9. Do not forget to add languagefish among your notes in the pan that you can offer in special nights.

flour-halva-with-walnuts-lezzet.name: Flour Halva With Walnuts
instructions: 1. melt the butter in the pan.
2. Add flour and roast the smell of jealous fire until going.
3. Milk, breaksses, eggs and powder sugar in a container.
4. Add it to the moment you are roasting.
5. Cook until it is dark.
6. Serve s&uuml with walnut;s and services.

fluke-with-coconut-rice-and-pickled-onio.name: Fluke With Coconut Rice And Pickled Onions

ingredients.item: Torn cilantro leaves with tender stems

instructions: Place onion slices in a medium bowl. Bring vinegar, ⅓ cup sugar, 2 tsp. salt, and ½ cup water to a simmer in a small saucepan over medium-high heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until sugar is dissolved, about 5 minutes. Immediately pour brine over onion and let cool. Cover and chill at least 1 hour.

Meanwhile, rinse rice until water runs clear (this removes surface starch and keeps rice from getting gummy). Combine rice, coconut cream, and 1½ cups water in a medium saucepan, season lightly with salt, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until rice is tender, 15–18 minutes. Remove from heat and let sit (keep covered) 10 minutes; fluff coconut jasmine rice with a fork. Keep warm.

Mix jalapeño, soy sauce, lime zest, lime juice, oil, ginger, garlic, and remaining ½ tsp. sugar in a medium bowl. Add fluke, macadamia nuts, and drained pickled red onion to jalapeño-ginger dressing; season with salt and toss gently to combine. Add cilantro and toss again.
Divide rice among bowls and top with fluke mixture and pieces of nori.
Do Ahead: Red onion can be pickled 5 days ahead; keep chilled. Dressing can be made 1 day ahead; cover and chill.

forest-fruit-puff-pastry-cake-lezzet.name: Forest Fruit Puff Pastry Cake
instructions: 1. It is easily applied in the upper row between the recipes of the tick.
2. Wait until the ruby dough is softened at room temperature.
3. Round die cut over with a lot of drills and oil paper series trays with fork.
4. Cook until fried in the oven set to 190 degrees.
5. Leave to cool.
6. Cook until the filling cream and cold milk are joined by the mixer.
7. Three-in-one index, which takes the cream to look for the ruby dough.
8. Keep the powder on the refrigerator until it is served by spreading sugar and decorating with forest fruits.

francesinha-to-the-mosque-teleculinaria.name: Francesinha To The Mosque

ingredients.item: 2 bifes do lombo  vitela + aparas de vitela q.b.

instructions: In a small pot with some olive oil, start by sautéing the shrimps. Add 1 onion and carrot, previously cut into pieces, and the thyme and let it shine well. Add some white wine, let it evaporate and then cover with water. Season with salt and pepper and boil, in mild heat, until you reduce and get a very aromatic broth.

In a separate pot, pour some olive oil and the meat chips, previously passed by some flour. Let it shine, withdraw and reserve. In the same pot, pour the remaining onion and garlic, chopped, celery, leek and tomatoes, cut into pieces, and blond leaf. Let it saute well, add the remaining white wine and let it evaporate. Put the pieces of meat back together, cover with water, correct the salt, season with pepper and let the broth reduce, in mild heat.
However, in a grill brushed with olive oil, the slices of bread tower and then grill the meats: the ham, the sausages cut in half and the steaks.

Coerce both broths separately. In a pot, pour the meat broth and add shrimp broth to taste. Take the light and add the black beers, Port wine, mustard and tabasco to taste. Let it boil in mild heat, until it reduces to about half and begins to thicken. Retrieve the salt and season with pepper. When you have the desired consistency, add the butter, stir well and book.

On a plate, have a slice of toasted bread, followed by a slice of ham, a steak and an open sausage. Tape with another slice of bread and then cover it with half the cheese slices. Repeat with the remaining ingredients, thus forming another French. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180 degrees, just for a few minutes for the cheese to melt. Remove and serve with the hot sauce.

freezer-chocolate-coconut-walnut-cookies.name: Freezer Chocolate Coconut Walnut Cookies
instructions: Mix together sugar, cocoa powder, and salt in a saucepan. Stir in milk and butter. Turn heat to medium and bring to a boil. Cook for 1 1/2 minutes. Remove from heat.

Stir the hot mixture continuously while adding flaked coconut, quick oats, old-fashioned oats, walnuts, peanut butter, and vanilla extract. Mix well. Spoon onto waxed paper-lined cookie sheets and freeze for 3 hours.

french-75-punch.name: French 75 Punch

ingredients.item: (4 cups) dry champagne or other sparkling dry white wine
Ice block or two smaller blocks

instructions: In a punch bowl, combine the gin, lemon juice, simple syrup, and bitters and stir until thoroughly blended.
Just before serving, pour in the Champagne and stir gently. Add the ice and garnish with the orange wheels.
To serve, ladle into punch glasses.

french-onion-smash-burger-tacos.name: French Onion Smash Burger Tacos
instructions: Melt the butter in a large pan over medium heat. Add the onion, season with salt, and cook, stirring frequently, for 30-40 minutes, until deep golden brown and caramelized.
Meanwhile, in a medium bowl, combine the ground beef, onion dip mix, black pepper, and red pepper flakes. Gently mix together until just combined.
Divide the beef mixture into 4 even balls. Use your palm to smash a beef ball onto each tortilla, spreading it over the whole tortilla and flattening it as much as possible.

Heat a cast iron skillet over medium-high heat. Working one at a time, add a smash taco to the pan, meat-side down, and cook for about 5 minutes, until the beef is deeply browned and cooked through. Flip the taco and cook for about 3 minutes on the other side. Transfer to a plate and repeat with the remaining tacos.
Top each taco with a handful of grated Gruyère, some caramelized onions, a few drops of Worcestershire sauce, a small handful of arugula, and a drizzle of balsamic glaze.
Enjoy!

french-toast-ham-and-cheese-argiro.name: French Toast Ham And Cheese
instructions: In a bowl, beat the eggs with the milk. Add some salt and pepper and set them aside.
Brush every slice of bread with some mustard and some mayonnaise.
Place on one slice a layer of ham and cheese and cover with the second slice of bread. Press lightly to glue the materials.
In a large pan, heat the butter and olive oil over medium heat.
We dip each toast into the mixture of eggs and milk, making sure it is covered well on both sides.
Keep them over the bowl for a while to drain and transfer to the hot pan.
Bake for 2–3 minutes on each side, until the cheese is browned and melted.
Serve immediately while warm.

french-yogurt-cake.name: French Yogurt Cake
instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Coat loaf pan with vegetable oil spray. Dust with flour; tap out excess.
Whisk 1 1/2 cups flour, baking powder, and kosher salt in a medium bowl.
Using your fingers, rub sugar with lemon zest in a large bowl until sugar is moist. Add yogurt, oil, eggs, and vanilla extract; whisk to blend. Fold in dry ingredients just to blend.
Pour batter into prepared pan; smooth top. Bake until top of cake is golden brown and a tester inserted into center comes out clean, 50–55 minutes.
Let cake cool in pan on a wire rack for 15 minutes. Invert onto rack; let cool completely. DO AHEAD: Can be made 3 days ahead. Store airtight at room temperature.

fresh-cod-in-potato-crust-teleculinaria.name: Fresh Cod In Potato Crust
fresh-cod-in-potato-crust-teleculinaria.original_name: Bacalhau fresco em crosta de batatas
instructions: Peel the potatoes and cut them into thin slices. Put them down in cold water.
Limpe o peixe de pele e espinhas e disponha-o num tabuleiro de forno. Escorra as batatas, seque-as com papel absorvente e, com elas, cubra o filete de bacalhau.
Place the cherry tomatoes around the fish, add the crushed garlic teeth (shelled) and season everything with salt and pepper.
Finally, sprinkle the potatoes with grated bread, oregano and rosemary and water with olive oil. Take it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 30 minutes.

frosted-chocolate-cookies.name: Frosted Chocolate Cookies
instructions: Pulse 6 oz. chocolate wafers in a food processor until finely chopped. Transfer to a large bowl.

Pulse brown sugar, cocoa powder, malted milk powder, baking powder, kosher salt, and 2 cups flour in food processor several times to combine. Add butter and pulse until pieces are broken up into bits no larger than a pea. Add to bowl with chocolate and toss to combine.

Stir vanilla and ⅔ cup cream in a measuring glass to combine, then slowly drizzle over chocolate mixture, mixing with a fork all the while. Mixture will look dry once you’ve added all the cream. Knead dough a few times in the bowl (it will not come together and will look crumbly), then transfer to a large piece of plastic wrap. Bring the edges of plastic up and over dough and press down to incorporate floury parts, then wrap tightly. Use the heel of your hand to press down firmly on the dough, forcing it to tightly fill out the plastic. This will help the dough adhere into a single mass and help the flour hydrate. Chill dough until firm, at least 1 hour.

Preheat oven to 400°. Roll out dough between 2 sheets of floured parchment paper to ¾" thick (you might not have to roll it very much). Punch out rounds with cookie cutter as close together as possible. Transfer biscuits to a parchment-lined baking sheet and freeze 10 minutes.
Bake biscuits, rotating baking sheet halfway through, until firm to the touch around the edges, 13–18 minutes. Let cool on baking sheet.

Meanwhile, heat corn syrup, remaining 4 oz. chocolate, and remaining ½ cup cream in a heatproof bowl set over a saucepan of barely simmering water (bowl should not be touching the water), stirring often, until chocolate is melted  and mixture is completely smooth. Set bowl with frosting into a large bowl of ice water and let cool, stirring occasionally, until thickened but still pourable and shiny. Spoon a scant tablespoonful of frosting onto each biscuit; sprinkle with sea salt.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead; keep chilled. Biscuits (without frosting) can be baked 2 days ahead; store airtight at room temperature.
